title: Ubiquiti UACC-Cable-Patch-Outdoor-C6A-15M-W outdoor Cat6a patch cable, 15m
category: Ubiquiti / LAN networks / Patch cables / Cat.6a (Color)
description: UniFi Premium Patch Cable Outdoor , The ultra-thin shielded outdoor patch cable Cat.6a with a length of 15m is designed to deliver optimal performance even in the most demanding conditions, specifically for 10GbE networks. It is an ideal solution for outdoor high-speed network installations Support for PoE++ power (60W) Shielded RJ45 connectors Insulated, durable jacket for long life and protection against outdoor elements Enhanced ESD protection with internal foil shielding and a drain wire Outer diameter: 3.5mm (lengths 1-8m), 3.9mm (lengths 12-15m) Bend radius: 28mm (lengths 1-8m), 31mm (lengths 12-15m)
specsSearch: Physical characteristics Shielding type SFTP (S/FTP) Cable type Stranded Design Classic Purpose Outdoor Sheath material Thermoplastic Elastomer Length [m] 1 Color White
